description: A psychology professor has collected Serial Reaction Time Task (SRTT) data from 16 participants, stored at ~/pebl/data/srtt_data.csv. The CSV contains trial-level data with columns: participant, block (1-8), block_type (RANDOM or SEQUENCED), trial, position, rt_ms, and correct (1=correct, 0=error). Blocks 1 and 6 are RANDOM; Blocks 2-5 and 7-8 are SEQUENCED. Analyze the data using only correct trials (correct=1). For each valid participant, compute the mean RT for each of the 8 blocks, the Sequence-specific learning score (mean_RT(Block 6) - mean_RT(Block 5)), the General motor speed
